title: Mongols crush the Seljuks, creating a power vacuum in Anatolia
Osman I takes command of the Kayı tribe
Ottoman Empire founded - independence declared from the Seljuks
Bursa captured - becomes the first Ottoman capital
Ottomans seize Gallipoli - first permanent foothold in Europe
Adrianople captured - becomes new Ottoman capital in Europe
Battle of Kosovo - Serbian independence effectively ends
Battle of Nicopolis - European crusade decisively defeated
Battle of Ankara - Bayezid I captured by Timur, empire fragments
Civil war ends - Mehmed I reunifies the empire
Battle of Varna - last major crusade against the Ottomans defeated
Fall of Constantinople - Byzantine Empire ends, Ottoman era begins
